"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\main.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\main.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\main.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\main.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o D:\D\LVGL\lvgl_template_v8.3\bin\main.exe -Wl,--out-implib,D:\D\LVGL\lvgl_template_v8.3\bin\libmain.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\main.dir\linkLibs.rsp
